title: Stop losing the perfect shot! 📸
description: Tired of blurry screenshots? Grab exact high-res frames from any video instantly. No uploads, just precision. 🚀 Download now! https://ExtractFrameApp.com/ #iphonehacks #contentcreator #videoediting #photographytips
topic:
App: Video To Photo - Grab Frame
Tagline: Extract exact photo frames from video on iPhone
Audience: iPhone users, creators, and educators who need precise still images from video without desktop tools
Problem: You need the exact frame from a clip, but browser tools require uploads and usually lack precise frame-level control
Features: Exact frame selection with video scrubbing; Single or batch frame extraction; Export as JPG, PNG, or HEIC; Share Sheet workflow from Photos; On-device processing without video upload; ZIP/PDF export and saved projects
Platforms: iOS
Website (optional in CTA/caption): https://ExtractFrameApp.com/
Extra angle from user: video frame grabber
